productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Check Brown Shirt
description: Composition Brown and cream checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a medium spread collar with a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two patch pockets with buttoned flaps, branding above the left pocket and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This brown and cream checked shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
